meta.reasoning_summary: 6s-3s is a weak hand. Facing a 20-chip call with no pot investment. Folding to preserve chips for better spots.
9c 2d offsuit is a trash hand. Folding pre-flop.

meta.reasoning: Holding 2s-7h (worst starting hand in poker) as small blind. Both other players folded pre-flop. Only s3 (big blind) remains. Even with 3:1 pot odds on a 10-chip call, 2-7 offsuit plays too poorly post-flop to justify continuing. Folding and preserving chips is correct.
Holding 6h 5h suited connectors heads-up vs BB. Pot odds are 3:1 (call 10 into pot of 30). Suited connectors have good implied odds and playability post-flop. Easy call.

result.summary: s3 wins by chip lead after 30 hands (s3: 1590, s2: 1120, s4: 670, s1: 620). Biggest pot: 2330. Showdowns: 11.
